_readme: TEMPLATE (tracked in git, no real keys). Copy to `secrets.local.json` and fill it in;
that copy is git-ignored. Tooling/scripts read secrets.local.json so keys aren't re-pasted.
posthog.personal_api_key_write : phx_...  scopes insight:write + dashboard:write  (create/update dashboards & insights)
posthog.personal_api_key_read  : phx_...  read-only: query:read + insight:read + dashboard:read  (pull analytics)
The phc_... PUBLIC client (event-ingest) key lives in src/analytics.ts and is safe to embed — not here.
Add more services as new top-level objects (e.g. "sentry": { "dsn": "" }).
